jobDescription: 1stdibs is the world’s largest online luxury marketplace for one-of-a-kind products. It has become the go-to source for the world's leading interior designers and discerning consumers to find antiques, vintage furniture, jewelry, vintage fashion and fine art. As you can imagine, we work in a complex logistics network to help get things from point A to point B as seamlessly as possible. As our new Team Lead of Domestic Logistics, you’ll help to ensure timely quoting, monitoring and delivery of Domestic orders. Reporting to the Director of Logistics, you will lead a team of employees located in NYC and Wyboston UK. What you'll do Coach and manage an operations team that is responsible for quoting shipments and tracking orders, including reviewing performance metrics, maintaining high team morale, and leading process improvements Actively manage vendor/carrier performance against their SLAs and KPIs Manage exceptions and escalations for your team Build cross-functional relationships and manage workflows across organizations, such as seller communications, customer support and VIP sales What you’ll bring3-5 years of experience in logistics, ideally within an e-commerce company Understand shipping requirements for small parcel and freight Experienced in managing and scaling operations teams in the past Analytical skills: ability to understand how to track team performance and KPIs Experience using Excel, Order Management System, Salesforce and other tools to analyze, manage and report on team performance Experience managing vendors, including the ability to understand contracts and manage SLA’s Excellent written and verbal communication skills; demonstrated ability to build relationships with subordinates, peers, executives, and clients Not a requirement, but a definite plus! Experience with white glove and door to door freight
